meta.title: Thai Student Association in Kuwait
meta.description: The official website of the Thai Student Association in Kuwait

brand.name: Thai Student Association in Kuwait
brand.tagline: The voice of Thai students in the State of Kuwait

home.title: Your Home Away from Home
home.lead: The Thai Student Association in Kuwait serves as a central hub and community network for Thai students. We are committed to supporting one another like a family.
home.aboutTitle: We Care for Each Other Like One Family
home.aboutText: Established as a vital liaison between Thai students, the Royal Thai Embassy, and the wider Thai community in Kuwait, our association facilitates cultural activities, provides academic guidance, and offers comprehensive support to our members.
home.ctaBandText: Your support helps the association host events and offer scholarships to its members. There is no obligation to donate — if you would like to support us, simply contact the association directly.

footer.about: The Thai Student Association in Kuwait: Fostering community, providing support, and creating a home for Thai students abroad.

students.title: Thai Students in the State of Kuwait
students.highlightsIntro: Highlights from our members — scholarships, awards, graduations, and remarkable stories
students.intro: There are currently 58 Thai students (29 male · 29 female) enrolled across 4 institutions in the State of Kuwait.

activities.title: Our Activities
activities.intro: Events and traditions the association organises each academic year. Browse by year.
activities.noEvents: No activities in the system yet — please add them in Google Sheet (tab: activities)

resources.title: Documents & Essential Information
resources.intro: Scholarships, guides, forms, and important documents for Thai students in Kuwait.
resources.noMatch: No documents match your search — try a different keyword or category
resources.homeSectionIntro: Essential information for Thai students in Kuwait

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Connect with our student council members or reach out to us for any support or inquiries.
contact.supportText: There is no obligation to donate. If you would like to support scholarships or activities, please contact the association directly through the channels below.
